prompt: For object detection visuals, generate an image showing the camera from image 1 and the camera from image 2 placed clearly side-by-side on a surface similar to the foreground element in image 1.
prompt_refined: Generate an image featuring the black vintage SLR camera from image 1 on the left and the blue vintage box camera from image 2 on the right. Both cameras should be positioned clearly side-by-side on a polished wooden surface, replicating the style and texture of the foreground railing in image 1.
objects: black vintage SLR camera (from image 1) on the left
blue vintage box camera (from image 2) on the right
wooden surface with style and texture of the foreground railing from image 1
